sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31759" key="e)kbo/leion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκβόλ-ειον</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σύαγρον, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,</foreign> prob.=<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐκβολὰς μήτρα,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dionys.Trag.</author> </bibl> I.</entryFree>
